Scenario.title: Operation Dream Job: Phishing-Driven Cyberattack on Healthcare Infrastructure
Scenario.overview: Healthcare and Public Health Intermediate A skilled threat actor initiates a targeted attack against a healthcare organization using spearphishing to deliver malware, escalating privileges to manipulate critical patient data and disrupt operations.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2007-0671 [CWE-502]: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features used in configuration...
stage.capec: CAPEC ID: 511 - Infiltration of Software Development Environment
stage.description: An attacker sends a malicious email attachment disguised as a patient record to a healthcare professional. The attachment exploits trust relationships to deliver malware onto the victim’s device.

stage.name: Execution
stage.kev: CVE-2024-50603 [CWE-250]: Improper Check of Function Return Value
stage.capec: CAPEC ID: 663 - Exploitation of Transient Instruction Execution
stage.description: The malware exploits an unpatched vulnerability in legacy medical device firmware to execute arbitrary code and establish persistence within the hospital’s network infrastructure.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: A scheduled task is created to run malicious payloads during off-hours, ensuring continued access to the network despite temporary lockdown measures.

stage.name: Privilege Escalation
stage.description: Stolen credentials from a compromised staff account are used to elevate privileges and access restricted systems like electronic health records (EHR).

stage.name: Defense Evasion
stage.description: Logs and event viewer entries are deleted to obscure the attack timeline and avoid detection by forensic analysis tools.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: Patient treatment records and lab results are altered to induce medical errors, destabilizing hospital operations and undermining public trust in healthcare services.

Scenario.summary: Operation Dream Job leverages spearphishing to infiltrate healthcare networks, escalates privileges through credential theft, and manipulates critical data to cause operational chaos and reputational damage.
